query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads, COUNT(DISTINCT email) as unique_emails, COUNT(CASE WHEN source = 'quiz_result' THEN 1 END) as quiz_leads, COUNT(CASE WHEN source = 'squeeze' THEN 1 END) as squeeze_leads FROM leads WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY);
